name: Chicken with Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Minced garlic or 1/4 tsp garlic powder
1/4 lb Zucchini trimmed and cut into 1/4 in slices
1/2 Red or green bell pepper, trimmed and cut into wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. HEAT THE OLIVE OIL in a wok or large skillet over high heat.
2. REDUCE the heat to medium-high.
3. ADD the chicken, onion, and garlic to the pan. STIR-FRY, stirring constantly, for 3 minutes.
4. ADD the zucchini and bell pepper. SAUTÉ for 3 more minutes, or until the zucchini is cooked but still slightly crisp and the onion is softened.
5. ADD the tomatoes, salt, Italian seasoning, and black pepper to the pan. COOK for an additional 3 minutes.
6. SERVE immediately. Serves 4.
NOTE: IN PLACE OF Italian seasoning, you can use 1/4 tsp oregano, 1/2 tsp basil, and 1/4 tsp rosemary as a substitute.
